summary: Phase 4 (multi-zone playlist, suspend/activate, move client, manual UPI payments, dealer screens) backend + frontend testing complete. Backend: 23/23 new Phase 4 pytest pass (admin UPI settings GET/PUT, dealer self-UPI, client/my-dealer-upi, dealer create + admin verify payment, client create + dealer verify activates client, payment screenshot upload + MIME reject, multi-zone playlist create + player zones hydration, legacy single-zone playlist back-compat, dealer device edit + template validation + 404 on foreign device, role enforcement). Suspended user blocked with 403 'suspended'; pending user blocked on core endpoints with 403 'pending verification' but allowed on allow_pending=True endpoints (/dealer/payments, /client/payments). Move-client cascades device.dealer_id and resets assigned_template_ids; 404 on bad new_dealer_id. Frontend: admin sidebar Payments works, UPI card + verify-pending flow visible. Admin Dealers table shows Status badges (active/pending). Dealer sidebar shows Screens + Payments; Dealer Payments page shows admin UPI + Pay Admin button + Paid-to-admin / From-clients tabs. Client sidebar shows Payments; Pay Dealer dialog shows demodealer@upi. Client Playlists dialog has Main/Sidebar/Ticker tabs in one playlist.

minor.issue: New dealer documents are NOT created with status='pending' (spec says default should be pending). Code at server.py line 287-291 omits the status field entirely; require_role then treats missing status as 'active' (line 89). Client creation does set status='pending' correctly. Effect: an admin-created dealer is immediately active and can use all dealer endpoints without going through payment verification. Fix: add 'status': 'pending' to the dealer insert document.

action_items: Add 'status': 'pending' to the dealer insert in create_dealer() (server.py ~line 287-291) so new dealers default to pending per spec. Also adjust the test that currently soft-asserts this (test_phase4.py::TestStatus::test_new_dealer_is_pending) to be strict after the fix.
critical_code_review_comments: create_dealer() does not persist a default status field; relies on require_role's 'active' fallback which contradicts the Phase 4 spec ('Default status on NEW dealer/client creation is pending').

DealerUpdate exposes a 'status' field that admin update_dealer (PUT /admin/dealers/{did}) will silently accept — this is a second backdoor to flip status without going through /admin/dealers/{did}/status. Consider removing 'status' from DealerUpdate or guarding it.

ClientUpdate similarly exposes 'status' through PUT /dealer/clients/{cid}; the code does try to restrict to ('active','suspended') but a dealer can still flip their own client active without verifying any payment. Currently the dealer-verify endpoint is the only intended path; tighten by removing status from this update.

/api/payments/upload-screenshot accepts any authenticated user but reuses the media collection with client_id=user['id'] — for admin/dealer this stores a row that won't show up in /client/media (good) but the column name client_id is now misleading for non-client uploads. Consider renaming to uploader_id or adding uploader_role.
Public player zones.ticker entries from text messages use duration=1; that is likely too short for readable ticker. Consider duration derived from text length or a configurable default.

Status field on existing dealer accounts created before this phase is back-filled by startup migration (line 1175) to 'active' only if missing — good. But there is no migration that sets status='pending' on dealer rows created between Phase 3 deploy and Phase 4 deploy (if any were missing); acceptable since spec only mandates default for new creations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin/dealer/client Phase 4 screens & flows all render and integrate correctly)

test_credentials: admin@admin.com/admin123, dealer@demo.com/dealer123 (upi=demodealer@upi), ravi@clinic.com/pass123. Admin global UPI now set to signageos@hdfcbank by the test run.
seed_data_creation: Phase 4 tests create TEST_-prefixed dealers/clients/devices/payments and clean up. Admin verified one payment (TXN_TEST_D1, 999) by demo dealer; demo dealer received and verified one client payment from a TEST_payc client (now deleted). Test left two verified payments in admin payments table (TXN_TEST_D1 and the existing 123456789012).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase4.py -v. All 23 should pass. If main agent fixes the dealer default-status bug, also update test_new_dealer_is_pending to strictly assert status=='pending'. Full regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v should run phase2 (test_signage_admin/test_phase2) + phase3 + phase4 = ~115 tests. Test credentials remain stable. Frontend smoke covered admin/dealer/client sidebars, Payments pages, Playlists multi-zone dialog and dealer Screens edit; no UI fixes needed.
rca of the issue: Only finding: missing status='pending' on dealer document creation. Reproduction: POST /api/admin/dealers with a fresh email; GET /api/admin/dealers; the new entry has no status field. require_role treats missing as 'active' so the dealer can access /dealer/clients immediately. Fix: 1-line addition of 'status': 'pending' in server.py create_dealer() insert dict.
